action.reasoning: Observation: train_residual.py failed because it tried to write MG+ enhanced cache to /data (read-only filesystem). Best PESQ=3.134 (MG+ baseline). Analysis: Need to fix paths to write cache to workspace directory. Also need to ensure predict.py model architecture matches training script exactly (BatchNorm, PReLU, num_blocks). Decision: Fix train_residual.py with workspace cache paths, update predict.py with matching architecture, train for 20 epochs, then evaluate next iteration.
